scope: TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 sparse-MLA/LightningIndexer manual_stream diagnostic backward bridge.

mode.intent: Stream selected local-window and LightningIndexer-compressed keys in chunks, save softmax row max/sum plus output, and avoid full selected K/V/probability tensors in the forward save contract.
mode.not_final: This is a PyTorch diagnostic bridge. It validates the no-full-selected-state trainable contract but is expected to be much slower than a fused sparse MLA/LightningIndexer kernel.

check_config.command: env CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=manual_stream CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_STREAM_CHUNK=2 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=512 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_STEPS=1 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh check-config

remote_container_parity.check: Compared _SparseMLAStreamingManualBackward against _SparseMLASplitManualBackward on a mixed-validity CPU sparse pattern.

one_gpu_smoke.command: env RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_s128_manual_stream_1xmi350_smoke_20260601 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=manual_stream CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_GBS=1 CANARY_STEPS=1 GPUS_PER_NODE=1 CANARY_EP=1 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2 CANARY_SKIP_SINGLE_RANK_FSDP=true CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_REQUIRE_IDLE_GPUS=true launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
one_gpu_smoke.command_shape: TP1_PP1_CP1_FSDP1_EP1_MBS1_GBS1_S128, visible GPU 2, checkpoint disabled, activation_checkpoint=none

external_node_state.note: The initial one-GPU run on visible GPU 0 was refused by the launcher because external PIDs 76961 and 76962 were active on GPUs 0 and 1. The validation run used visible GPU 2 and did not disturb those workloads.

why_not_promoted_for_perf: The PyTorch streaming loop passed correctness and trainability but ran only 11 tok/s at S128 on 1xMI350.
manual_split remains the useful short-sequence correctness/perf bridge.
manual_stream is valuable because it matches the future fused kernel save contract more closely: row stats plus output, not full selected K/V/probs.
next: Use manual_stream to debug no-full-selected-state semantics at small shapes.
Replace the Python chunk loops with the retained 1a-style fused sparse MLA/LightningIndexer kernel path before attempting S4096 sparse performance claims.
Keep guarded dense fallback for S4096 systems smokes until the fused sparse path lands.
